raw_consumer_statement: I purchased 2 XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX from XXXX XXXX. Upon opening the seats were very cheaply made and i asked to return within policy of 30 days to request a return. The seats were returned within 30 days. XXXX tracking confirmed seats delivered back to XXXX and signed for. XXXX will not issue refund. I am being charged for goods i do jot have
